mnemonics: G.E.N.E.S.I.S. Block: 'Genesis Establishes Network, Every Subsequent Is Secure' to remember it's the foundational, first block that initializes the entire blockchain.
keyPoints: The genesis block is the very first block ever mined on a blockchain.
It is hardcoded into the software of the application, meaning it is not created through the normal mining process.
It serves as the root of the blockchain, providing the foundation upon which every subsequent block is built and verified.
commonMistakes: Believing the genesis block has a previous hash (it does not; its 'previous hash' field is typically set to all zeros or a special value).
Thinking the genesis block was mined for a reward (the coinbase transaction is usually unspendable or has special meaning).
